abilities.name: Arms Dealer
abilities.text: After a friendly upgrade is discarded from another model within 6" this model may attach it.

abilities.name: Escape Plan
abilities.text: When this model activates, if it is within 2" of a table edge or impassable terrain, it may move up to 2".

abilities.name: Manipulative
abilities.text: If this model has not yet activated this turn, enemy models may not cheat fate in opposed duels with this model.

actions.name: Black Market Pistols
actions.costs_and_restrictions: When this action is declared, choose if it has a range of "(melee)1" or "(gun)12". For each raise this action receives, make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Puncture
triggers.text: When resolving, this attack receives one additional raise.

actions.name: Gunrunner
actions.effects: This model may discard an upgrade attached to itself and attach it to the target. Then, the target moves up to 2".

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Sneak Away
triggers.text: Once per turn. This model must be within 1" of blocking terrain. Place this model anywhere within 8" of its current location within 1" of blocking terrain.

actions.name: Resupply
actions.effects: Draw up to two cards from this model's discard pile with values of 1-5.
